'''Elan Mak''' was a [[Fluggrian]] [[podracer]] from [[Ploo IV]] who participated in the [[Boonta Eve Classic]] race on the [[planet]] [[Tatooine]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo|Naboo Crisis]]. Mak finished the race in fifth place.<ref name="AEYNTK" />

{{Char-stub}}
